highlights.description: Module migrated to new GitHub organization: `github.com/plexusone/omnivault-onepassword`
Updated for 1Password SDK v0.4.0 API breaking changes

upgradeGuide.description: Run `go get github.com/plexusone/omnivault-onepassword@v0.2.0` to fetch new module

changed.description: SDK API calls updated from field access to method calls (`client.Items` to `client.Items()`)
List operations changed from iterator pattern to direct slice returns

documentation.description: Update README badges and shields for new organization

infrastructure.description: Migrate CI workflows to shared workflow references

highlights.description: Initial release of OmniVault provider for 1Password

added.description: Full CRUD operations (Get, Set, Delete, Exists, List)
Multi-field item support with automatic field type inference
Flexible path formats including native `op://` references
Vault and item name-to-ID resolution with caching
Comprehensive error mapping to OmniVault error types
